articles.title: Odisha BJP shifts its MLAs to Paradip ahead of Rajya Sabha polls
articles.description: The BJP MLAs, including Ministers, boarded two luxury buses to the port town after a crucial meeting with senior party leaders at the BJP state party headquarters on Saturday (March 14, 2026).

articles.title: Rajya Sabha polls: Naveen Patnaik accuses BJP of horse-trading in Odisha
articles.description: The Congress shifted some of its legislators to a resort near Bengaluru amid the cross-voting fears and disagreements over its strategy

articles.title: Papmochani Ekadashi 2026: Date, timings, parana time and rituals
articles.description: Papmochani Ekadashi  Date timings parana time and rituals

articles.title: After dal makhni and mutton, LPG shortage now chokes Agra’s iconic 'petha' industry
articles.description: Agra's iconic petha industry is in crisis as a commercial LPG shortage shuts down manufacturing units at Noori Darwaza — and the district administration says there is no problem at all.

articles.title: Mutual fund NFOs: 2 ETFs will open for subscription now on Monday. Check details
articles.description: Two new passive funds, a commodity-based ETF and a mid-cap ETF, are opening for subscription on Monday. The HSBC Gold ETF closes on March 18, and the SBI Nifty Midcap 150 ETF closes on March 24, both with a minimum investment of Rs 5,000. Investors are advised to choose funds based on their individual risk profiles and financial goals.

articles.title: Meena Sankranti 2026: Date, time, punya kaal and rituals explained
articles.description: Meena Sankranti  Date time punya kaal and rituals explained

articles.title: CM Adityanath tells recruitment boards to avoid making undignified remarks on any community
articles.description: The controversy comes days after Opposition parties accused the BJP government in Uttar Pradesh of being "anti-Brahmin" following the alleged mistreatment of Swami Avimukteshwaranand Saraswati during the Magh Mela in Prayagraj.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Morgan Housel, who wrote The Psychology of Money: ‘Everything has a price, but not all prices…’
articles.description: Morgan Housel encourages viewing market challenges as fees for valuable returns, advocating for a low-ego approach to wealth and high savings rates.

dailyNews.title: ‘Arrested without any evidence’: Political leaders welcome climate activist Sonam Wangchuk’s release
dailyNews.description: Sonam Wangchuk  was released from prison on Saturday, days before the Supreme Court's hearing of the plea filed by his wife challenging his detention.

dailyNews.title: US bounty on Mojtaba Khamenei? Washington offers $10 million for intel on Iran's new Supreme Leader, IRGC chiefs
dailyNews.description: US State Department has placed a $10 million (over  ₹83 crore) bounty on Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and senior IRGC officials under its Rewards for Justice programme, in Washington's boldest intelligence push against Tehran yet.

dailyNews.title: Congress releases second list of 23 candidates for Assam elections, leaves 15 seats for allies
dailyNews.description: Congress is leading an alliance of opposition parties, including CPI(M) and Assam Jatiya Parishad, with the CPI (ML) Liberation also lending its support.

dailyNews.title: Iran US News LIVE Updates: Trump urges friendly nations to help secure Strait of Hormuz as war enters third week
dailyNews.description: Iran US News LIVE Updates: Iran urged civilians in the United Arab Emirates to leave areas around ports, docks, and what it called ‘American hideouts,’ claiming that United States forces had launched attacks on Iran from those locations.

dailyNews.title: Iran war live: Trump urges allies to keep Hormuz open amid Gulf attacks

dailyNews.title: Iraq taking private plane to Mexico for World Cup play-off
dailyNews.description: Iraq will travel to Mexico by private plane for their World Cup play-off despite calls from coach Graham Arnold to postpone the match amid the escalating US-Israeli war with Iran, the country's FA president Adnan Dirjal says.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed Potomac sewage cleanup complete after massive spill ahead of summer America250 celebrations
dailyNews.description: Potomac River sewage spill repairs have been completed after President Donald Trump approved a federal disaster declaration allowing FEMA assistance.

dailyNews.title: For Trump, a Promised Economic Boom Collides With the Costs of War
dailyNews.description: President Trump had envisioned a growing economy and improving fortunes for American families in 2026. That appears at risk in his war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump Pardons: Lobbyist Charged in Extortion Attempt
dailyNews.description: Josh Nass had recently represented Joseph Schwartz, a former nursing home executive who was convicted of tax crimes before being freed by the president late last year.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Officials Embraced an Animal Rights Campaign
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is curbing animal experiments in response to shifts in public opinion, technological advances, years of animal rights advocacy and the work of a conservative activist.

dailyNews.title: Trump Wins When Oscar Winners Stay Silent
dailyNews.description: Right now it does matter a lot whether actors can find the right words.

dailyNews.title: What Trump Didn’t Know About Iran
dailyNews.description: Ali Vaez, the Iran project director at the International Crisis Group, explains the history of miscalculations that led to the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Tehran threatens to retaliate after U.S. attacks vital Iranian oil hub
dailyNews.description: President Trump said that other countries would join the U.S. in sending warships to the Strait of Hormuz, but did not share more specifics.

dailyNews.title: Trump thanks TSA agents working with no pay amid government shutdown
dailyNews.description: TSA officers faced their first full missed paycheck Friday.

dailyNews.title: FCC Chair Brendan Carr says broadcast licenses are not a "property right"
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with CBS News Saturday, Federal Communications Chair Brendan Carr doubled down on his warning that broadcast licenses could be revoked amid President Trump's criticisms of media coverage of the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump asks China, France, others to help keep Strait of Hormuz open amid war in Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump called on countries like the U.K., France, South Korea, Japan and even China to help keep the Strait of Hormuz open as Iran tries to strangle the flow of oil from the region. Charlie D'Agata reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran is ready to negotiate a ceasefire but he's not ready to make a deal
dailyNews.description: In a wide-ranging interview, President Donald Trump said he’s not ready to make a deal to end the war with Iran, despite Iran’s willingness to do so.

dailyNews.title: Trump says there’s been ‘total obliteration’ of Iran militarily
dailyNews.description: President Trump told NBC News’ Kristen Welker in a nearly half hour phone conversation that Iran has been “militarily defeated” and he believes other countries will help to secure passage through the Strait of Hormuz.
